ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state/UT */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state/UT */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state/UT is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state/UT */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state/UT */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the state/UT in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state/UT */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the state/UT was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity of the crime (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the crime (e.g., imprisonment, fine) */,
  "legal_act" TEXT /* Relevant legal act or statute for the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/UT where the crime occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the crime data is recorded */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents of the crime type */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, closed, pending) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was resolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_crimes" (
  "special_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special crime data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/UT where the crime occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the special crime data is recorded */,
  "poa_act_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents under the Prevention of Atrocities (POA) Act */,
  "pcr_act_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents under the Protection of Civil Rights (PCR) Act */,
  "other_crimes_against_scs_count" INTEGER /* Number of other crimes against Scheduled Castes (SCs) */,
  "protection_status" TEXT /* Status of protection measures (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "case_closure_rate" TEXT /* Rate of case closures for the special crimes */,
  "ongoing_cases" INTEGER /* Number of ongoing cases for the special crimes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("special_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_crimes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, officer) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/UT the user is associated with */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., police, judiciary, administration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., law, policy, guideline) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/UT the document is associated with */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_documents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/UT where the trend is observed */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., police records, court data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
